allow: Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Path ''.next'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Path ''.next'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path ''node_modules/.cache'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Path ''.next'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; npm run build 2>&1")
